final:
module RefModule(  
    input clk,  
    input [2:0] current_state,  
    input [2:0] desired_state,  
    output reg [2:0] control_output  
);  

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
    control_output <= desired_state;  
end  
endmodule
